CapabilityBehaviorDatum.description: One external behavior coordinate; refusal is a value, never a failed observation.
CapabilityBehaviorDatum.title: CapabilityBehaviorDatum

CapabilityBehaviorObservation.description:
Vector-valued capability behavior conditioned on, but not attributed to, its envelope.

Harness, resource, delivery, and evaluator refs are stratification conditions. This carrier
never infers their health, combines them into capability behavior, or claims causation.
CapabilityBehaviorObservation.title: CapabilityBehaviorObservation

ContextExposure.description:
Spine-owned evidence of exact context carriage, never attention or causal effect.

The embedded pre-exposure inspection projection covers only the frozen frame and selection.
A later Reins projection of this completed exposure remains external to avoid a hash cycle.
Neither projection, the carrier, nor an acknowledgement proves attention or authority.
ContextExposure.title: ContextExposure

ContextExposureComponent.description: Semantic context member whose private body remains in its sealed source container.
ContextExposureComponent.title: ContextExposureComponent

ContextExposureQuantity.description: A measured size or an explicit unknown; unknown never becomes numeric zero.
ContextExposureQuantity.title: ContextExposureQuantity

ContextExposureSegment.description: One stage-local artifact segment derived from one or more semantic components.
ContextExposureSegment.title: ContextExposureSegment

ContextExposureStage.description: One timed carriage stage with exact ordered stage-local artifact segments.
ContextExposureStage.title: ContextExposureStage

ContextSelection.description: Audience-sealed support selection; it records loss and can only HOLD.
ContextSelection.title: ContextSelection

ContextSelectionEntry.description: One audience-sealed fact disposition with its local WHY and requiredness.
ContextSelectionEntry.title: ContextSelectionEntry

LifecycleCanonImageCarrier.description: Exact canon-image wire carrier; Council retains semantic membership proof.
LifecycleCanonImageCarrier.title: LifecycleCanonImageCarrier

MeasurementApplicationReceipt.description: No-effect evidence of one exact measurement update applied to one target.
MeasurementApplicationReceipt.title: MeasurementApplicationReceipt

ProjectionEnvelope.description: A sealed semantic view; content addressing is not producer authentication.
ProjectionEnvelope.title: ProjectionEnvelope
